meaning: n.[鸟]蜜雀(食花蜜,能学人语和其他鸟鸣)
examples: Carmen Riu, head of the Spanish hotel group, owns about 5 percent of TUI.
The big families that own the hotels in those countries are major shareholders of TUI.
It depends on three birds for pollination - the bellbird, stitchbird and the tui.
In Miami, Jason Atkins, founder and CEO of Tui Lifestyle, buys furniture in bulk at wholesale prices.
